title: Norwegian Galette Delight
description: Indulge in a flaky Norwegian-inspired galette, perfect for a sweet treat or dessert. Charred fruit adds a delightful twist to this indulgent pastry.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
In a large bowl, mix together mixed berries, granulated sugar, and almond extract (if using).
Spoon the berry mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Use a knife or pastry brush to create a decorative edge.
Place the galette on the prepared baking sheet and brush the top with the remaining egg wash.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional berries if desired.
